name: SMN4Lang — Speech & Music Naturalistic fMRI/MEG
description: OpenNeuro dataset (ds004078) pairing fMRI with rich speech and music stimuli and detailed linguistic annotations in Mandarin Chinese. Designed for fine-grained modeling of naturalistic language and auditory processing.
citation: Wang S, et al. (2022). A synchronized multimodal neuroimaging dataset for studying brain language processing. Scientific Data, 9, 590.
